parameters.content: Connector template for NotebookLM::sync_bundle_stub. Fill placeholder env vars before execution.

parameters.jsCode: return [{json:{"service_name":"notebooklm","display_name":"NotebookLM","operation_id":"sync_bundle_stub","method":"POST","base_url":"{$env.NOTEBOOKLM_BASE_URL}","path":"/v1/notebooks/__NOTEBOOKLM_NOTEBOOK_ID__/sources:batchCreate","url":"{$env.NOTEBOOKLM_BASE_URL}/v1/notebooks/__NOTEBOOKLM_NOTEBOOK_ID__/sources:batchCreate","headers":{"Authorization":"Bearer {$env.NOTEBOOKLM_ACCESS_TOKEN}"},"body":{"title":"__NOTEBOOKLM_TITLE__","sources":["__SOURCE_URI__"]},"query":{},"integration_mode":"manual_bridge","status":"placeholder_only","credential_placeholders":["NOTEBOOKLM_BASE_URL","NOTEBOOKLM_ACCESS_TOKEN","NOTEBOOKLM_NOTEBOOK_ID"],"notes":"NotebookLM-style handoff placeholder. return [{json:{status:'placeholder_only', service:$json.service_name, operation:$json.operation_id, integration_mode:$json.integration_mode, body:$json.body, notes:$json.notes}}];
